text:
Gold Dust Girl (, Kinpun Shōjo) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

| colspan="3" align="center" |A girl who sheds gold dust from her body--500g of gold can be harvested from her daily bath. Very shy, she rarely leaves the house.
|

|

Summary

This card is the Gold Dust Girl in card form. She releases golden dust from her body on a daily basis, hence her name. One bath a day will give you around 500 grams worth of gold. She is located in a room four floors below ground and guarded by various traps and a guard. She's timid and quiet.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.046 :: 
全身から金粉をふき出す少女。１日１回の入浴で約５００ｇの金が取れる。非常に内気でずっと家から出ない。
|-
![Eng]
|No.046 :: Gold Dust Girl 
A girl that rubs gold dust off her whole body. It is worth 500g a day if taken from her bath after bathing. Does not leave the house very much and is quite shy.
|}

Trivia

The Gold Dust Girl is featured in two of the Greed Island Tutorial episode ending clips of the 2011 anime adaptation (in Episodes 71 and 74). It appears that Killua has a crush on her as when Gon used "gain" on her card, Killua had heart eyes and fell backwards as his nose bled.
